notes: Initialized src-layout package, tooling, CI, pre-commit, gitleaks config, empty loop runner, and S0 tests. No live API or funds touched.

tests.config_load: current config/*.yaml loaded; invalid configs rejected

notes: Added strict Pydantic schemas, YAML loader, and cross-file checks for risk, fills, exchanges, symbols, and strategies. No env secrets read and no exchange calls made.

tests.real_fetch: OKX public REST wrote BTC/ETH/SOL 1h, 12960 bars each, coverage 100%, gaps 0, duplicates 0

notes: Added historical OHLCV ingestion, Parquet and DuckDB storage, quality reporting, and fetch CLI. Binance public REST returned 451 in this location, so OKX public REST was used for data landing only. No secrets or trading endpoints used.

tests.real_health: reports/data_health.json generated from S2 DuckDB; 90d coverage 100%, gaps 0, duplicates 0, halt false

notes: Added Data Health detection and CLI for gaps, duplicates, off-grid timestamps, abnormal prices, stale data, and halt-required reporting. No risk thresholds changed and no trading actions taken.

tests.orderbook: schema write passed; simulated websocket reconnect passed

notes: Added forward-only orderbook snapshot and funding-rate collectors/storage plus documentation that L2 history cannot be backfilled. No persistent external websocket started.
Added deterministic feature functions for returns, volatility, ATR, volume change, spread bps, and lookahead detection. No external data or trading side effects.

tests.signals: deterministic; momentum signal; mean reversion hard stop and time stop

notes: Added strategy SDK and config-driven momentum/mean-reversion strategies. Strategies only emit candidate signals and do not approve, size, or execute trades.
Added conservative backtest engine with next-bar-open fills, slippage, fee modeling, stop-distance sizing, caps, min-notional, and core report metrics. No exchange calls or live orders.

tests.walk_forward_smoke: BTCUSDT 12960 bars, 14 OOS segments, regimes bull/bear/chop visible

notes: Added walk-forward IS/OOS windows with purge+embargo, regime labels, Sharpe decay, and deflated Sharpe trial penalty. Generated local smoke report without changing strategy params or approvals.

tests.registry: candidate strategies cannot enter Signal Loop

notes: Added strategy registry, approval filter, verifier thresholds, maker-checker enforcement, and rejection logging. Baseline strategies remain candidate with max_notional_quote 0.
Added deterministic risk engine for sizing, exposure caps, loss circuit breakers, runtime halts, and kill-switch actions. No live broker actions executed.
Added paper broker order state machine with orderbook fills, partial fills, cancel, idempotent clientOrderId, positions, realized PnL, JSON persistence, and reconciliation. Paper only.
Added loop runtime, default loop specs, APScheduler adapter, heartbeats, run-log writes, and dead-man switch. Did not start persistent scheduler or send external alerts.

tests.alerts: disabled by default; no external channel configured
tests.fill_fidelity: slippage and quantity drift reported only

notes: Added monitoring alert sink, dashboard snapshot builder, trade ledger parquet writer, fill-fidelity parquet/reporting, and calibration documentation. No external alerts, real keys, or trading side effects.
